products.name: Auriga Racing Elite Inline Skate Boots (Silver)
products.description:
Auriga Racing Elite Inline Skate Boots are designed in India and produced by some of the finest leather craftsmen, purely handmade with love using the finest Japanese Carbon Fiber layered unilaterally and microfiber leather upper bonded with the genuine leather.

The Boot Shell: Auriga Racing Elite boots are made with 100% carbon fiber and are fully heat moldable. A custom like snug fit ensures that each and every stroke delivers the maximum power to your skates towards the finish line and ultimately to the podium and glory.

Carbon Fiber: Auriga Racing boots are made from high strength Carbon fiber specially sourced from one of the world's top carbon fiber manufacturers in Japan. The layers of carbon fiber are laid down unilaterally giving the maximum utilization of fiber to get strength from it using special kind of resins.

The Toe Box: The toe box is designed with ample room ensuring comfort during long skating sessions while maintaining structural integrity.

Heat Moldability: Fully heat moldable for a custom fit around heel and ankle area.
products.short_description: Auriga Racing Elite Inline Skate Boots are a class apart from others. Made with 100% carbon fiber specially outsourced from one of the finest producers of carbon fiber in Japan.
products.feature_description: Premium 100% carbon fiber boots with Japanese craftsmanship

product_type_details.sizes: EU36, EU37, EU38, EU39, EU40, EU41, EU42, EU43, EU44, EU45

products.description: Auriga Racing Starter Inline Skate Boots are designed for beginners and intermediate skaters. Made with high-quality fiberglass composite material that offers excellent performance at an affordable price point.
products.short_description: Perfect entry-level boots for aspiring speed skaters with quality construction.

products.name: Auriga Racing Elite Aluminum Frame 4x110mm
products.description: The Auriga Racing Elite Aluminum Frame is designed for maximum power transfer and speed. Made from aerospace-grade 7075 aluminum alloy, this frame offers exceptional stiffness and lightweight performance for competitive inline speed skating.
products.short_description: High-performance 4x110mm aluminum frame for competitive speed skating.
products.feature_description: Aerospace-grade aluminum frame for elite performance

products.name: Auriga Racing Pro Aluminum Frame 3x125mm
products.description: The Auriga Racing Pro Frame in 3x125mm configuration is perfect for marathon and long-distance skating. The larger wheels provide higher top speed while maintaining excellent maneuverability.
products.short_description: Professional 3x125mm frame for marathon and long-distance skating.
products.feature_description: Marathon-ready frame with larger wheel configuration

products.name: Auriga Racing Speed Wheels 110mm 85A (8-Pack)
products.description: Auriga Racing Speed Wheels are engineered for maximum speed and durability. The 85A durometer provides excellent grip on indoor and outdoor surfaces while maintaining high-speed performance.
products.short_description: High-performance 110mm speed wheels with 85A durometer for optimal grip and speed.

products.name: Auriga Racing Speed Wheels 125mm 86A (6-Pack)
products.description: Auriga Racing 125mm Speed Wheels are designed for marathon and long-distance skating. The larger diameter provides higher top speed and better roll, while the 86A durometer offers excellent durability.
products.short_description: Marathon-grade 125mm wheels for maximum speed and distance performance.
products.feature_description: Large diameter wheels for marathon skating

products.name: Auriga Racing ABEC-9 Ceramic Bearings (16-Pack)
products.description: Auriga Racing ABEC-9 Ceramic Bearings deliver exceptional speed and durability. Featuring ceramic balls and stainless steel races, these bearings offer minimal friction and maximum performance for competitive skating.
products.short_description: Premium ABEC-9 ceramic bearings for maximum speed and durability.
products.feature_description: Top-tier ceramic bearings for elite performance

products.name: Auriga Racing ABEC-7 Steel Bearings (16-Pack)
products.description: Auriga Racing ABEC-7 Steel Bearings offer excellent performance at a competitive price. Ideal for training and recreational skating with smooth rolling and good durability.
products.short_description: Quality ABEC-7 steel bearings for training and recreational use.
products.feature_description: Reliable steel bearings for everyday skating

products.name: Auriga Racing Aerodynamic Speed Helmet
products.description: The Auriga Racing Aerodynamic Speed Helmet is designed for maximum speed and safety. Featuring a streamlined design that reduces air resistance, this helmet meets all international safety standards while providing optimal ventilation.
products.short_description: Aerodynamic speed helmet for competitive inline skating with superior ventilation.

products.name: Auriga Racing Skin Suit - Team Edition
products.description: The Auriga Racing Team Edition Skin Suit is engineered for professional competition. Made with high-stretch aerodynamic fabric that reduces drag while providing maximum comfort and flexibility during intense racing.
products.short_description: Professional competition skin suit with aerodynamic fabric and team design.

product_type_details.sizes: XS, S, M, L, XL, XXL

products.name: Auriga Racing Complete Skate Package - Elite
products.description: The Auriga Racing Elite Complete Skate Package includes everything you need to compete at the highest level. This package includes Elite Carbon Fiber Boots, Elite Aluminum Frames, Speed Wheels, and ABEC-9 Ceramic Bearings - all perfectly matched for optimal performance.
products.short_description: Complete elite skate package with boots, frames, wheels, and bearings.
products.purchase_note: Package includes: Elite Boots, Elite Frames, 8x110mm Wheels, ABEC-9 Bearings

products.name: Auriga Racing Skate Tool Kit
products.description: The Auriga Racing Skate Tool Kit contains all the essential tools for maintaining and adjusting your inline skates. Includes hex keys, bearing press, bearing puller, and wheel rotation guide.
products.short_description: Complete tool kit for inline skate maintenance and adjustment.

specifications.Includes: Hex Keys, Bearing Tools, Carrying Case

products.name: Auriga Racing Skate Bag - Pro
products.description: The Auriga Racing Pro Skate Bag is designed to safely transport and store your inline skates and gear. Features multiple compartments, padded protection, and durable construction.
products.short_description: Professional skate bag with multiple compartments and padded protection.
products.feature_description: Durable bag for skate storage and transport
